channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Sparks Tomorrow 动画 Streams Video Message from Director Minoru Ōta
item.description: Series debuts on Netflix worldwide on July 5 ― Netflix began streaming on Tuesday a video message from director Minoru Ōta for the television anime of Hiro Yuki's Sparks of Tomorrow (20 Seiki Denki... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Sparks of Tomorrow Anime Streams Video Message from Director Minoru Ōta

item.title: [动画][公开] Anime News Network One Piece 动画 Remake 公开 1st Episode Artwork
item.description: The offiical X/Twitter account for The One Piece, Wit Studio's remake of the One Piece anime for Netflix, unveiled on Wednesday during Netflix's Anime Studio Focus panel at this year's Annecy... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The One Piece Anime Remake Unveils 1st Episode Artwork

item.title: [动画][剧场版][PV][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Ribbon Hero 动画 Film的 2nd 预告PV 公开 More 声优阵容, Theme Song
item.description: Seiran Kobayashi, Kōki Uchiyama, Mayumi Shintani co-star with theme by Japanese/Korean group Girls Archives. ― Anime studio Twin Engine posted the second trailer for The Ribbon Hero, its new anime... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The Ribbon Hero Anime Film's 2nd Trailer Unveils More Cast, Theme Song

item.title: [续作] Anime News Network Vengeance, Sincerely, Your Broken Saintess 季度 2 Debuts on October 1

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList Yami Shibai 17th 季度 Announced Summer 2026
